::: top-banner
:::

::: {.front-landing}
::: {.front-hero-title}
<span class="hero-line">Marine Megafauna</span><span class="hero-line">and Climate Change</span><span class="hero-line">Modeling Workshop</span>
:::

::: {.front-subtitle}
Save the Blue Five | Santa Cruz, Galápagos | June 8-12, 2026
:::

![](images/front-logo.png){.front-logo}
:::
